scripts.setup: npm run build && npx snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 12 pot12_0000.ptau -v && npx snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot12_0000.ptau pot12_final.ptau --name="First contribution" -v && npx snarkjs groth16 setup build/circuit.r1cs pot12_final.ptau circuit_0000.zkey -v && npx snarkjs zkey contribute circuit_0000.zkey circuit_final.zkey --name="1st Contributor" -v && npx snarkjs zkey export verificationkey circuit_final.zkey verification_key.json
